subcodes.title: Words spoken at Hotel Ansonia in New York, 1912-04-18
subcodes.first_line: Assuredly, give to the poor. If you give them only words, when they put their hands into their pockets after you have gone, they will find themselves none the richer for you!
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @words vs deeds, @charitable associations; humanitarian activities
